code:
graph TB %% Creator Journey & Funnel %% From discovery to transformation subgraph AWARENESS["🌟 Awareness Stage"] direction TB DISCOVER[Social Discovery
X, LinkedIn, YouTube]:::awareness CONTENT[Free Content
Blog, Newsletter]:::awareness VIRAL[Viral Moments
Thought Leadership]:::awareness DISCOVER --> CONTENT VIRAL --> CONTENT end subgraph INTEREST["💡 Interest Stage"] direction TB SUBSCRIBE[Newsletter Subscribe
Weekly Insights]:::interest DOWNLOAD[Free Toolkit
Lead Magnet]:::interest ENGAGE[Content Binge
Deep Dive]:::interest SUBSCRIBE --> ENGAGE DOWNLOAD --> ENGAGE end subgraph CONSIDERATION["🤔 Consideration Stage"] direction TB CASE[Case Studies
Creator Testimonials]:::consideration DEMO[Free Session Sample
Vibe OS Preview]:::consideration EMAIL[Nurture Sequence
Transformation Story]:::consideration CASE --> EMAIL DEMO --> EMAIL end subgraph CONVERSION["💰 Conversion Stage"] direction TB ENTRY[Entry Offer
$27-47 Session]:::conversion CORE[Core Product
$97-297 Course]:::conversion MEMBER[The Realm
Monthly Membership]:::conversion ENTRY --> CORE CORE --> MEMBER end subgraph RETENTION["🔄 Retention & Ascension"] direction TB COMMUNITY[Active Community
Peer Support]:::retention WINS[Quick Wins
Success Stories]:::retention UPGRADE[Ascension Path
Inner Circle]:::retention COMMUNITY --> WINS WINS --> UPGRADE end subgraph ADVOCACY["🚀 Advocacy Stage"] direction TB REFERRAL[Creator Referrals
Word of Mouth]:::advocacy COLLAB[Collaboration
Co-Creation]:::advocacy SHOWCASE[Portfolio Showcase
Arcanea Platform]:::advocacy REFERRAL --> COLLAB COLLAB --> SHOWCASE end %% Touchpoints subgraph TOUCH["📱 Key Touchpoints"] direction LR T1[frankxhq.com
Main Hub]:::touch T2[AI Music Academy
Learning Platform]:::touch T3[Vibe OS
Sonic Experience]:::touch T4[Arcanea
Creation Space]:::touch T5[The Realm
Inner Sanctuary]:::touch end %% Product Ladder subgraph LADDER["🪜 Product Ladder"] direction TB L1[Free: Toolkit & Newsletter
$0]:::free L2[Vibe OS Session
$27-47]:::lowticket L3[Course/Workshop
$97-297]:::midticket L4[The Realm Membership
$47-97/month]:::highticket L5[Inner Circle Coaching
$997-2997/month]:::premium L1 --> L2 L2 --> L3 L3 --> L4 L4 --> L5 end %% Stage flow AWARENESS --> INTEREST INTEREST --> CONSIDERATION CONSIDERATION --> CONVERSION CONVERSION --> RETENTION RETENTION --> ADVOCACY ADVOCACY -.->|viral loop| AWARENESS %% Touchpoint connections INTEREST --> TOUCH CONSIDERATION --> TOUCH CONVERSION --> TOUCH RETENTION --> TOUCH %% Product ladder alignment INTEREST -.-> L1 CONVERSION -.-> L2 CONVERSION -.-> L3 RETENTION -.-> L4 RETENTION -.-> L5 classDef awareness fill:#FFE066,stroke:#CCB34D,stroke-width:2px,color:#333 classDef interest fill:#66E0FF,stroke:#4DB3CC,stroke-width:2px,color:#333 classDef consideration fill:#B366FF,stroke:#8C4DCC,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff classDef conversion fill:#66FF8C,stroke:#4DCC70,stroke-width:2px,color:#333 classDef retention fill:#FF8C66,stroke:#CC704D,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff classDef advocacy fill:#FF66E0,stroke:#CC4DB3,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff classDef touch fill:#4A90E2,stroke:#2E5C8A,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff classDef free fill:#90E24A,stroke:#5C8A2E,stroke-width:2px,color:#333 classDef lowticket fill:#E2904A,stroke:#8A5C2E,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff classDef midticket fill:#E24A90,stroke:#8A2E5C,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff classDef highticket fill:#9B4AE2,stroke:#5C2E8A,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff classDef premium fill:#E24AE2,stroke:#8A2E8A,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
